base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of aquatic_enemies — a character from 1990 super mario world. Cheep-cheep + Blurp + Urchin + Rip Van Fish swimming enemies. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Cheep-cheep + Blurp + Urchin + Rip Van Fish swimming enemies
